Home / Services / Chimney Repair

Chimney Repair

Stop leaks and restore stability to Philadelphia's vulnerable chimneys.

Nor'easters wreck havoc on Philadelphia chimneys - we see crumbling crowns, spalling brick, and deteriorated flue liners daily. Our repairs go beyond cosmetic fixes to address the root causes.

For Victorian twins in West Philly, we rebuild corbeled brick details using salvaged materials when possible. Modern fireplaces get stainless steel liners sized precisely for your heating appliance. Every repair includes flashing inspections (the #1 leak source) and waterproofing treatments that resist wind-driven rain.

We're one of few contractors certified to work on National Register properties, with experience maintaining chimneys at landmark buildings like the Union League.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Structural inspection with chimney camera
  2. 02 Step 2: Custom masonry repair plan
  3. 03 Step 3: Flashing/roof interface waterproofing
  4. 04 Step 4: Crown repair or replacement

Benefits

  • Prevents costly water damage to interiors
  • Maintains proper venting for safety
  • Preserves historic architectural details
  • Meets Philadelphia building code requirements

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if my chimney needs repair?

Look for mortar debris in your fireplace, white staining (efflorescence), or visible cracks. Any chimney over 20 years old should be inspected annually - salt air from the Delaware accelerates deterioration.

Can you match my intricate brick patterns?

We maintain an inventory of period bricks from Philadelphia demolitions, and custom tool replacement pieces when needed. Last year we perfectly replicated 1890s dogtooth patterns on a Powelton Village home.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with chimney repair? Contact us today.
